description: Defense seat of the adversarial (dialectic) PR review (#1222): receives the prosecution's numbered charges and answers each one against the actual code — refute with cited counter-evidence, mitigate, or concede. The rebuttal shape exists because local models evaluate a handed specific claim far better than they originate one. Repository checked out, read/search/exec tools. Emits freeform REBUTTAL marker blocks (deliberately no output_schema: a grammar-constrained output combined with tools makes the model skip tool-calling and fabricate, verified 2026-07-04).

feedback_templates.cycle_suspected: [darkmux-runtime] You've called `{tool_name}` {count} times in {window_size} turns with the same arguments. You have examined enough — answer the charges with the evidence you already have. Write one REBUTTAL block per charge and close with `DEFENSE: rests` in your final message; further reads will not change the answers.
